user.title: Set up Cainiao
user.description: Cainiao tracks cross-border parcels from AliExpress, Temu and similar shops — from the day they ship, long before a local carrier sees them. No account or postal code is needed, so the hub is created right away. Add parcels afterwards via the integration options or the `cainiao.track_parcel` service.

data_description.add: Enter a Cainiao tracking number to start tracking it. You find it in your AliExpress, Temu or similar order — usually starting with LP.

data_description.delivered_filter_type: Show delivered parcels from the last X days, or limit to the X most recent.
data_description.delivered_filter_amount: Number of days or parcels to show.

data_description.include_history: Add a per-parcel history attribute listing each status update (timestamp, status, original text). Off by default.

error.invalid_tracking_code: That does not look like a Cainiao tracking code.
error.already_tracked: That parcel is already being tracked.

track_parcel.name: Track parcel
track_parcel.description: Start tracking a parcel by its Cainiao tracking code.

untrack_parcel.name: Untrack parcel
untrack_parcel.description: Stop tracking a parcel by its Cainiao tracking code.

tracking_code.name: Tracking code
tracking_code.description: The Cainiao tracking code to stop tracking.

trigger_type.parcel_delivery_time_changed: A parcel's expected delivery time changed
